entries.text: I'm Caliban.
Titania said she saw [[cressida]] holding the cookies ~15 minutes before I asked: close to [[cressida]]'s estimated time of death.
Miranda says she left the cookies outside [[cressida]]'s door; no answer, and she wasn't brave enough to knock twice.
The body was splayed face-down when I found it; the purple pool of blood underneath hadn't reached the neck yet.
There's a large hole in the chest, about the size of a basketball; the wound wasn't visible while the body lay face-down, so whatever made this hole didn't penetrate through the back.
Plain room: bed in the corner, single doorway to the corridor. It's directly across from my cabin on the same hall. [[cressida]] found dead here.
Stained decorative foil wrappers lie scattered on the bed and floor.
The door to this room has stayed open at least since I woke up. No signs of tampering or forced entry.
There are no name plaques, labels, or any identifying features around the doors that would denote their occupants.
Every cabin door on the ship seems to have the same design.
From my testing: Walking out of my room to the hall opens the door; Stepping into my room closes the door behind me.
Hypothesis: doors only respond to their registered occupant.
Every member of the crew has a synthetic body. These bodies work exactly like human ones, except for a few differences, like how we bleed purple blood.

According to Stephano: synthetic bodies upload snapshots of their memories every minute. So if we die, that backup is used to restore our memories when we're resurrected. Any memory between last backup and death is lost forever.
[[stephano]] showed me this document. It's a list of who's awake on each day. Anyone not highlighted on a particular day is offline, undergoing their scheduled maintenance window.
[TODO: finalize schedule] Day 1 highlights Miranda, Titania, Stephano, Cressida, Puck, and Ariel as active.
Day 2 highlights Miranda, Titania, Stephano, Cressida, Puck, and Caliban as active.
[TODO: finalize schedule] Day 3 highlights Miranda, Stephano, Cressida, Caliban, and Bianca as active.
[TODO: finalize schedule] Day 4 highlights Stephano, Cressida, Caliban, Bianca, and Ariel as active.

Miranda's cookies — neat foil wrap. Titania produced them mid-interview and handed them to me; same batch Miranda claims she left outside [[cressida]]'s door.
